body:
[selector-match] frame: https://js.stripe.com/v3/elements-inner-card-685d4329c69eb2ef7f86089d17e15b9a.html#__shared_params__[version]=v3&__shared_params__[light_exp
[selector-match] number: input[name="cardnumber"]
[selector-match] expiry: input[name="exp-date"]
[selector-match] cvc: input[name="cvc"]
[selector-match] postal: input[autocomplete="postal-code"]
{
  "ok": false,
  "error": "no success or error message detected"
}
